# =============================================================================
# Python dependencies for the RNA-seq pipeline
# =============================================================================
# Core
pyyaml>=6.0
pandas>=1.5
numpy>=1.23
scipy>=1.9
matplotlib>=3.6
seaborn>=0.12
scikit-learn>=1.1
markdown>=3.4
pytest>=7.0

# Pure-Python bioinformatics (eliminates R and most compiled-binary deps)
pydeseq2>=0.4            # DE analysis -- replaces R DESeq2
pysam>=0.21              # BAM indexing/reading -- replaces samtools
HTSeq>=2.0               # Read counting -- replaces featureCounts (subread)

# Note: The only tool that MUST be a compiled binary is the read mapper
# (STAR or HISAT2). There is no pure-Python short-read aligner.
# cutadapt, multiqc, deeptools (bamCoverage) are all pip-installable Python.
